mechanism_harness_mine.mutator: malformed-trailing-token (drops the $ end-anchor in /^\d+$/ numeric validation -> accepts trailing garbage like 5abc)
mechanism_harness_mine.verdict: MECHANISM WORKS — the harness automatically discovered, twice-verified, and baked in a real blind spot.

competency_measurement.metric: held-out truth_full (the established functional oracle) — NOT the 5abc axis that was sharpened (anti-circularity, pre-registered)
competency_measurement.pool: 8 fresh blind haiku cron specimens; natural 5abc split (c6 rejects=correct; 7 accept; base rate ~1/8)
competency_measurement.selection_changed: yes — sharper picks c6 (spec-correct on 5abc) over c1
competency_measurement.competency_changed: no — both selected winners have identical truth_full 0.9767
competency_measurement.note: the true truth-best specimen c5 (truth_full 1.0) ACCEPTS 5abc and is selected by neither genome; the 5abc axis is orthogonal to functional truth.

verdict: Mechanism positive + competency null. The automated suite-sharpening mechanism fires end-to-end and bakes in a real blind spot; the five-gate promotion correctly declines because the sharpened axis (5abc) is decoupled from held-out truth_full. Mechanism-works != competency-improves.
corroborates: the judge-arm verdict (5abc suite-expressible, truth-neutral, B==C) — now confirmed through the meta-loop lens.
bounds: n=1 pool (K=8); the gate decision is structural (truth_full values are decoupled from 5abc), not seed-dependent.
promoting would require weighting the sharpened axis (rigging) — refused.
N6: pool scores reproducible via cron-pilot/runs/judge-arm/score.mjs; MANIFEST.json + battery are the audit trail.
